What is Purisaki?

Purisaki Berberine is an innovative, discreet botanical wellness patch formulated to work in harmony with your body’s natural rhythm, helping you stay centered and focused on your health journey throughout the day.

How does Purisaki work?

According to our research, the patch functions by gently releasing a berberine-infused botanical blend over an 8-hour period, providing continuous, steady support to complement your mindful lifestyle choices.

Usage Process

Simply remove the patch from its protective packaging, apply it to clean, dry skin on your upper arm, shoulder, or back, and press for 10-15 seconds. Wear for 8 hours daily as part of your ritual.
